title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited:
Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited!
